default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Teero and GrowthX to discuss content performance, new ideas, and project updates.](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Slight dip in clicks, but no significant ranking drops; likely due to search volume variation](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [New AI-related content ideas identified and scheduled for upcoming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [8 articles published this week; 4 pending edits, 7 ready for review, 3 more expected Monday](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Airtable Ops project in progress, expected completion by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Analysis

  - [Slight dip in clicks observed this week](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Investigated using Search Console and SEMrush](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [No significant ranking drops detected; some positions improved](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
      - "Can hygienists job benefits" ranking at \#5
      - "Dental hygiene shortage" improved by 2 positions to \#6 (actually \#3 in incognito search)
  - [Hypothesis: Variation in search volume causing click fluctuations](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)

### New Content Ideas

  - [Focus on AI-related topics in dentistry](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Selected topics for upcoming weeks:](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
    1.  AI dental receptionist for your practice
    2.  Role of AI in dental insurance verification
    3.  (Unspecified AI-related topic)
  - [Aida noted high engagement with AI content, comparing it to past trends like metaverse/blockchain](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)

### Content Production Update

  - [8 articles published this week](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [4 articles pending edits (Nate to review)](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [7 articles ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [3 more articles expected to be ready by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Aida mentioned varying difficulty in AI-generated content across topics](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)

### Airtable Ops Project

  - [Currently in progress](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Expected completion by end of the week](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Nate to follow up with Daniel via DM and potentially schedule a meeting](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nate to review and edit flagged articles](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Aida to message Daniel about Airtable Ops project progress](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Publish 2-3 new AI-related articles in the coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Monitor performance for potential growth, especially with new AI content](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Aida to have 3 more articles ready by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/X7Ez_8SyNb3-EURVGaer3xys9d1RR5Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

action_items.description: DM Daniel re AirOps progress; update Aida on response
